tasks.subject: Task 1: Install Anthropic SDK and add env var
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `@anthropic-ai/sdk` to dependencies and add `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` placeholder to `.env.local`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `package.json` (via npm install)
- Modify: `.env.local`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `@anthropic-ai/sdk` appears in `package.json` dependencies
- [ ] `.env.local` has an `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=` line
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` exits 0

**Verify:** `npm run typecheck` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", ".env.local"], "verifyCommand": "npm run typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["@anthropic-ai/sdk in package.json", ".env.local has ANTHROPIC_API_KEY", "typecheck exits 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Supabase migration — chat tables
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `chat_sessions` and `chat_messages` tables in Supabase.

**Files:**
- Create: `supabase/migrations/20260620000000_chat_tables.sql`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Migration file exists with correct schema
- [ ] Tables applied in Supabase dashboard

**Verify:** Supabase dashboard shows both tables under Table Editor.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["supabase/migrations/20260620000000_chat_tables.sql"], "verifyCommand": "ls supabase/migrations/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["chat_sessions table exists in Supabase", "chat_messages table exists in Supabase"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Chat streaming API route
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `app/api/chat/route.ts` — POST handler that streams Claude responses back to the client.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/api/chat/route.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] POST with valid body returns streaming plain-text response
- [ ] Invalid body returns 400
- [ ] Markers passed through in stream
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` exits 0

**Verify:** `npm run typecheck` → exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/chat/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["POST returns streaming response", "invalid body returns 400", "typecheck exits 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Session PATCH API route
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `app/api/chat/session/route.ts` — PATCH handler for contact upsert.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/api/chat/session/route.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] PATCH with valid body returns `{ ok: true }`
- [ ] Missing/invalid sessionId returns 400
- [ ] Degrades safely when Supabase unavailable
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` exits 0

**Verify:** `npm run typecheck` → exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/chat/session/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PATCH returns ok:true", "invalid sessionId returns 400", "typecheck exits 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: ChatMessage component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `components/chat/ChatMessage.tsx` — single message bubble with marker stripping and quote button.

**Files:**
- Create: `components/chat/ChatMessage.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] User messages right-aligned with gold background
- [ ] Assistant messages left-aligned with white background
- [ ] [SHOW_QUOTE_BUTTON] stripped and replaced with button that opens QuoteModal
- [ ] [CONTACT:...] stripped silently
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` exits 0

**Verify:** `npm run typecheck` → exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/chat/ChatMessage.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["user messages gold right-aligned", "assistant messages white left-aligned", "SHOW_QUOTE_BUTTON renders button", "typecheck exits 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: ChatPanel component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `components/chat/ChatPanel.tsx` — scrollable message list, typing indicator, input bar with streaming.

**Files:**
- Create: `components/chat/ChatPanel.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Welcome message shown on open
- [ ] Streaming fills assistant bubble progressively
- [ ] Typing dots shown while streaming with empty content
- [ ] Enter submits, Shift+Enter newline
- [ ] CONTACT marker detected → PATCH fired
- [ ] Network errors show friendly error bubble
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` exits 0

**Verify:** `npm run typecheck` → exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/chat/ChatPanel.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["welcome message shown", "streaming works", "typing dots shown", "CONTACT detection fires PATCH", "typecheck exits 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: ChatWidget + layout integration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `components/chat/ChatWidget.tsx` and add it to `app/layout.tsx`.

**Files:**
- Create: `components/chat/ChatWidget.tsx`
- Modify: `app/layout.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Floating bubble appears on all pages
- [ ] Bubble opens/closes panel with framer-motion animation
- [ ] sessionId managed in sessionStorage
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` exits 0
- [ ] `npm run build` exits 0

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/chat/ChatWidget.tsx", "app/layout.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["bubble on all pages", "open/close animation works", "sessionId in sessionStorage", "build exits 0"]}
```
